interfaces.name: getHomePageHighlights
interfaces.description: Fetch highlighted content for the home page, including featured articles, journals, and recent issues.

interfaces.name: getSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the article search results page.

label.description: User-facing label for the subject area.
User-facing label, e.g., 'Citations - High to Low'.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search articles by keyword with filters and sorting for use on the home and search results pages.

parameters.name: queryString
parameters.description: Raw search text, e.g., 'neuroscience', 'climate change impact'.

parameters.name: publicationYearMin
parameters.description: Minimum publication year filter, e.g., 2021.

parameters.name: publicationYearMax
parameters.description: Maximum publication year filter, e.g., 2022.

parameters.name: subjectAreas
parameters.description: Array of subject area enum values, e.g., ['neuroscience', 'environmental_science'].

parameters.name: articleTypes
parameters.description: Array of articleType enum values, e.g., ['research_article', 'clinical_trial', 'review_article'].

parameters.name: accessTypes
parameters.description: Array of accessType enum values, e.g., ['open_access'].

parameters.name: licenses
parameters.description: Array of license enum values, e.g., ['cc_by'].

parameters.name: hasOpenData
parameters.description: If true, filter to articles with open data available.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'relevance', 'citations_desc', 'publication_date_newest', 'sample_size_desc'.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: 1-based page number for pagination.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of results per page.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch full metadata and related context for a specific article detail page.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to display.

interfaces.name: getArticleFullTextHtml
interfaces.description: Get the HTML full-text content and metadata for an article's full-text view.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article whose HTML full text should be loaded.

htmlContent.description: Full HTML body of the article.

interfaces.name: getArticleCitation
interfaces.description: Generate a formatted citation for an article in a given style.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to cite.

parameters.name: style
parameters.description: Citation style key, e.g., 'apa', 'mla', 'chicago'.

formattedCitation.description: Citation text in the requested style.

interfaces.name: getArticleDatasets
interfaces.description: List datasets associated with an article for the 'Data & Materials' tab.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article whose datasets should be listed.

interfaces.name: addArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add an article to an existing reading list or create a new list and add the article in one step.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to add.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: ID of an existing reading list to add the article to.

parameters.name: newReadingListName
parameters.description: If provided and readingListId is not set, a new reading list with this name will be created and the article added.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item (article) from a reading list.

parameters.name: readingListItemId
parameters.description: ID of the reading list item to remove.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Explicitly create a new empty reading list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the reading list, e.g., 'Climate Impact Review'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description of the reading list.

interfaces.name: renameReadingList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing reading list.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: ID of the reading list to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New name for the reading list.

interfaces.name: deleteReadingList
interfaces.description: Delete a reading list and all its items.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: ID of the reading list to delete.

interfaces.name: getReadingListsSummary
interfaces.description: List all reading lists with basic metadata and item counts for the Reading Lists page.

itemCount.description: Number of articles in the reading list.

interfaces.name: getReadingListItems
interfaces.description: Get all articles for a specific reading list for display.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: ID of the reading list to view.

interfaces.name: addArticleToCollection
interfaces.description: Add an article to an existing collection/bibliography or create a new collection and add the article.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to add.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of an existing collection to add the article to.

parameters.name: newCollectionName
parameters.description: If provided and collectionId is not set, a new collection will be created with this name and the article added.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromCollection
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item (article) from a collection/bibliography.

parameters.name: collectionItemId
parameters.description: ID of the collection item to remove.

interfaces.name: createCollection
interfaces.description: Create a new empty collection/bibliography.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the collection, e.g., 'Urban Air 2018-23'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description of the collection.

parameters.name: exportNotes
parameters.description: Optional notes on how this collection will be used or exported.

interfaces.name: renameCollection
interfaces.description: Rename an existing collection.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of the collection to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New name for the collection.

interfaces.name: deleteCollection
interfaces.description: Delete a collection and all of its items.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of the collection to delete.

interfaces.name: getCollectionsSummary
interfaces.description: List all collections with basic metadata, item counts, and distinct journal counts for the Collections page.

itemCount.description: Number of articles in the collection.

distinctJournalCount.description: Number of distinct journals represented in the collection.

interfaces.name: getCollectionItems
interfaces.description: Get all articles in a specific collection for display.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of the collection to view.

interfaces.name: exportCollectionBibliography
interfaces.description: Export a collection as a bibliography in a specified format (e.g., RIS, BibTeX, plain APA text).

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of the collection to export.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Export format key, e.g., 'ris', 'bibtex', 'apa_plain_text'.

interfaces.name: getDatasetDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch metadata for a dataset associated with an article, for the dataset detail page.

parameters.name: datasetId
parameters.description: ID of the dataset to display.

interfaces.name: getDatasetFiles
interfaces.description: List files associated with a dataset, for the 'View file list' interaction.

parameters.name: datasetId
parameters.description: ID of the dataset whose files should be listed.

interfaces.name: getJournalSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the journals list page.

interfaces.name: searchJournals
interfaces.description: Search and filter journals for the journals list page.

parameters.name: queryString
parameters.description: Optional journal name search text, e.g., 'Journal of Environmental Studies'.

parameters.name: subjectAreas
parameters.description: Array of subject area enum values to filter journals.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sort key, e.g., 'impact_factor_desc', 'median_review_time_asc', 'apc_asc', 'title_asc'.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: 1-based page number.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of journals per page.

interfaces.name: getJournalDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch full information about a journal for the journal detail page.

parameters.name: journalId
parameters.description: ID of the journal to display.

interfaces.name: getJournalIssuesByYear
interfaces.description: List issues for a given journal and year for the Issues tab.

parameters.name: journalId
parameters.description: ID of the journal whose issues to list.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Publication year, e.g., 2023.

interfaces.name: getIssueContents
interfaces.description: Get all articles contained in a specific journal issue for the issue contents page.

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: ID of the journal issue to display.

interfaces.name: getSubmissionGuidelines
interfaces.description: Fetch submission guidelines for a specific journal for the Submission Guidelines page.

parameters.name: journalId
parameters.description: ID of the journal whose submission guidelines should be displayed.

interfaces.name: createSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Create a new saved search alert based on the current search query and filters.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Human-readable alert name, e.g., 'ML Health Weekly'.

parameters.name: queryString
parameters.description: Search query text the alert should use.

parameters.name: publicationYearMin
parameters.description: Lower bound for publication year filter.

parameters.name: publicationYearMax
parameters.description: Upper bound for publication year filter.

parameters.name: subjectAreas
parameters.description: Array of subject area enum values used in the alert filter.

parameters.name: articleTypes
parameters.description: Array of articleType enum values used in the alert filter.

parameters.name: accessTypes
parameters.description: Array of accessType enum values used in the alert filter.

parameters.name: licenses
parameters.description: Array of license enum values used in the alert filter.

parameters.name: hasOpenData
parameters.description: If true, filter to articles with open data; omitted if not applied.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sort option key, e.g., 'publication_date_newest', 'relevance', 'citations_desc', 'sample_size_desc'.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: Alert frequency, e.g., 'weekly', 'daily', 'monthly', 'immediate'.

interfaces.name: getSavedSearchAlerts
interfaces.description: List all saved search alerts for the Alerts / Saved Searches page.

interfaces.name: updateSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Update basic settings (name, frequency, activation) for an existing saved search alert.

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: ID of the alert to update.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New name for the alert.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: New frequency, e.g., 'weekly', 'daily', 'monthly', 'immediate'.

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Whether the alert is active.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Delete a saved search alert.

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: ID of the alert to delete.

interfaces.name: runSavedSearchAlert
interfaces.description: Execute the query associated with a saved search alert and return current matching articles.

parameters.name: alertId
parameters.description: ID of the alert whose search should be run.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: 1-based page number.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of articles per page.

interfaces.name: getBrowseOverview
interfaces.description: Fetch data for the Browse landing page, including subject areas, popular journals, recent issues, and top-cited articles.

articleCount.description: Approximate number of articles in this subject.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page.

editorialBoardHtml.description: HTML describing the editorial board and staff.

interfaces.name: getHelpFaqContent
interfaces.description: Get structured help and FAQ content, including guidance on search, filters, reading lists, collections, alerts, and datasets.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the Policies & Terms page, including open access and data sharing policies.

interfaces.name: getContactPageInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact information and any configurable text for the Contact page.

additionalInfoHtml.description: Optional HTML with additional instructions or links to help and policies.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateReadingListByName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find a reading list by name or create it if it does not exist, used by addArticleToReadingList.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCollectionByName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find a collection by name or create it if it does not exist, used by addArticleToCollection.

helperFunctions.name: _applyArticleSearchFilters
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter and sort parameters to article search queries.

helperFunctions.name: _persistSavedSearchAlert
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or update SavedSearchAlert records in storage.

helperFunctions.name: _paginateResults
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to paginate arrays of entities before returning them from list interfaces.
